dashboard.label: AWS CloudTrail Security Dashboard
dashboard.description: Dashboard for monitoring AWS CloudTrail security events.

search.query: index=aws sourcetype=aws:cloudtrail | table _time eventName eventSource userIdentity.userName sourceIPAddress awsRegion
index=aws sourcetype=aws:cloudtrail | stats count by eventName | sort -count | head 10
index=aws sourcetype=aws:cloudtrail | stats count by sourceIPAddress | sort -count | head 10
